locations.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
locations.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普（英語：Richard Bowdler Sharpe，1847年11月22日—1909年12月25日）是一位英國動物學家兼鳥類學家，於大英博物館擔任鳥類標本的策展人。在其職涯裡，夏普出版了一些有關鳥類的專著，並整理出博…

locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Rufous paradise flycatcher
relations.evidence: unirufa in Luzon | image2 = Southern Rufous Paradise Flycatcher.jpg | image2_caption = A male of the nominate subspecies in Camiguin | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Terpsiphone | species = cinnamomea | authority = (Sharpe, 1877) | subdivision_ranks = Subspecies | subdivision = See text | synonyms = * Zeocephus cinnamomeus }} The rufous paradise flycatcher (Terpsiphone cinnamomea) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae native to Indonesia and the Philippines

relations.subject: Rufous paradise flycatcher
relations.evidence: The rufous paradise flycatcher occurs in multiple protected areas such as Pasonanca Natural Park, Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park, Samar Island Natural Park in the Philippines. It inhabits primary and secondary forest up to an elevation of . IUCN has assessed both the Northern and Southern rufous paradise flycatchers as least-concern species
